name: qiniso
display_name: Qiniso — verified fact-checking for AI agents
description: 56 deterministic fact-checkers for AI agents — IBAN, VAT, VIN, barcodes, IDs, crypto, dates, holidays.
long_description: The deterministic fact-verification layer for AI agents: 56 checks across 8 domains — identifiers (IBAN, payment cards, ISBN, VIN, GTIN/UPC/EAN barcodes), web/network (TLD, domain, IP, UUID, URL, email), finance (ISIN, CUSIP, SEDOL, LEI, routing), crypto (ETH/BTC addresses), national & tax IDs for 24 countries (incl. EU/UK VAT), academic IDs, locale (phone, date parsing, currency, holidays), and address parsing. Validates the structured facts an agent emits against checksums and curated data, returning a clear result or an honest error — never a guess. Runs locally, no key, nothing to authorize.
